news.t: Topping Patterns in Real Estate ETFs Suggest Selling

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Real Estate Bear 3X ETF (DRV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Real Estate Select Sector index. The fund provides 3x leveraged inverse exposure to an index that captures large cap equities of the US real estate segment. DRV was launched on Jul 16, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Topping Patterns in Real Estate ETFs Suggest Selling
data.text: A double top pattern may usher in selling ahead of a likely rate cut. Consider these tactics to profit from falling REIT prices.
